episodes.title: Sydney Slam: Max Survives, Kyle Ascends, Mox Throws Hands
episodes.blurb: Grand Slam Australia fallout: Moxley and Takeshita beat each other to a draw, Babes of Wrath hang onto the tag belts, and MJF vs. Brody King closes the night.

episodes.title: The One About Star Ratings
episodes.blurb: An hour of arguing about quarter-stars and what actually makes a five-star match.

episodes.title: Sisters of Sin & The Tag Title Tournament
episodes.blurb: The Women's Tag tournament heats up and the Don Callis Family summit gets tense.

episodes.title: A Revolutionary Revolution
episodes.blurb: Texas Death Match fallout and a nearly 5-hour Revolution PPV breakdown.

episodes.title: Is It A Swerve?
episodes.blurb: Action from the Mission Ballroom in Denver, plus Swerve's frustrations boil over.

episodes.title: Blood & Guts Build Begins
episodes.blurb: The road to Blood & Guts kicks off and we are not okay about it.

episodes.title: FTR's Honorable Loss & Moxley's Briefcase of Doom
episodes.blurb: FTR drops a classic and Moxley's briefcase looms over everything.
